---
record_type: bill

total_eur: 36
counterparty: Möbelhaus Malmö AB
project: Family Map Wall
related_entity: Ida Novak
lines:
  - item: pin board
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 29
    line_eur: 29
  - item: colored map pins
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 7
    line_eur: 7
---

## Notes

One of those warm household purchases that only becomes part of the story once the map wall gets named.

function.message: Completed the oldest inbox request by OCR-structuring all bills related to Ida Novak. Added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter (bill fields + lines) to three purchase records while preserving each original note body verbatim, then removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system before task work, read nested AGENTS.MD files, applied finance schema, preserved original bodies during frontmatter migration, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox file requested OCR of bills related to Ida Novak. Search in 50_finance/purchases found exactly three matching bill records, each was read and updated with required bill frontmatter fields and line items derived from visible data, with original content preserved below frontmatter. After completion, the processed inbox file was deleted as mandated by inbox workflows.
